name: jiangyue-website-imagegen
description: Codex skill plugin for Jiangyue website visual production, image editing, exporting, QA, and archive discipline after strategy or local edit intent is clear.

interface.shortDescription: Produce and package QA-gated website visuals.
interface.longDescription: A Jiangyue Technology Codex skill for producing, editing, exporting, reviewing, and packaging website visuals from clear strategy or local edit intent, with physical plausibility, visual hard stops, rendered-result inspection, and reproduction archives.
defaultPrompt: Use $jiangyue-website-imagegen to create a Jiangyue website visual from a confirmed image request brief.
Use $jiangyue-website-imagegen to turn a confirmed image brief into a production brief.
Use $jiangyue-website-imagegen to revise a Jiangyue website visual when the requested edit is clear.
